segments.text: Tobit his father counted every day. When the days of the journey were expired, and they didn’t come,
he said,
Is he perchance detained? Or is Gabael perchance dead, and there is no one to give him the money?
segments.speaker: Tobit

segments.text: He was very grieved.
But his wife said to him,
The child has perished, seeing he waits long.
segments.speaker: Tobit's wife

segments.text: She began to bewail him, and said,
I care about nothing,  my child, since I have let you go, the light of my eyes.
segments.speaker: Tobit's wife

segments.text: Tobit said to her,
Hold your peace. Don’t worry. He is in good health.
segments.speaker: Tobit

segments.text: And she said to him,
Hold your peace. Don’t deceive me. My child has perished.
segments.speaker: Tobias

segments.text: And she went out every day into the way by which they went, and ate no bread in the day-time, and didn’t stop bewailing her son Tobias for whole nights, until the fourteen days of the wedding feast were expired, which Raguel had sworn that he should spend there. Then Tobias said to Raguel,
Send me away, for my father and my mother look no more to see me.
segments.speaker: Tobias

segments.text: But his father-in-law said to him,
Stay with me, and I will send to your father, and they will declare to him how things go with you.
segments.speaker: Tobias

segments.text: Tobias said,
No. Send me away to my father.
segments.speaker: Tobias

segments.text: Raguel arose, and gave him Sarah his wife, and half his goods, servants and cattle and money;
and he blessed them, and sent them away, saying,
The God of heaven will prosper you, my children, before I die.
segments.speaker: Tobias

segments.text: And he said to his daughter,
Honor your father-in-law and your mother-in-law. They are now your parents. Let me hear a good report of you.
segments.speaker: Edna

segments.text: Then he kissed her. Edna said to Tobias,

May the Lord of heaven restore you, dear brother, and grant to me that I may see your children of my daughter Sarah, that I may rejoice before the Lord. Behold, I commit my daughter to you in special trust. Don’t cause her grief. 

### Footnotes
: + Many ancient authorities read “Are they perchance put to shame?
segments.speaker: Edna

segments.text: : + Some authorities read
Woe is me.
segments.speaker: Edna
